ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File name of the teacher's profile picture */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number assigned to the teacher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the teacher */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher was hired */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the teacher (e.g., active, on leave, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Computer science, Physics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_subjects" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject taught by the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id", "subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building name or code where the classroom is located */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the classroom */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available in the classroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_classrooms" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom assigned to the teacher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher started teaching in the classroom */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher stopped teaching in the classroom (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id", "room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher profile */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the teacher */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education background of the teacher */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Teaching experience of the teacher */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the teacher holds */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the teacher has received */,
  "teaching_style" TEXT /* Description of the teaching style of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_profiles_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the availability entry */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the teacher is available on the given date */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the availability */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_availability_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classroom_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization entry */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the utilization entry */,
  "utilization" REAL /* Percentage of classroom utilization on the given date */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the utilization period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the utilization period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classroom_utilization_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher teaching the subject */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject distribution started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject distribution ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_distribution_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_distribution_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_distribution_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., Teacher Workload, Classroom Utilization) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
